svg.title: CI/CD Pipeline — from git push to live EC2 deployment
svg.desc: Full CI/CD flow from developer push through GitHub Actions to ECR and EC2

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens during git push in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why do we run tests before building the Docker image?')
sendPrompt('What Docker images get built in GitHub Actions?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions push Docker images to ECR?')
sendPrompt('What is ECR and why do we use it?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions SSH into EC2 to deploy?')
sendPrompt('Why does EC2 need git pull during deployment?')
sendPrompt('Why is pulling a pre-built image faster than building on EC2?')
sendPrompt('What happens during docker compose up in deployment?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the health check fails after deployment?')
